growth_picks.analyst_take: Blowout Q2 but near ATH with 62% YTD gain; peak margins (81% guided) historically precede downturns; insiders net sellers

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Down 81% after FY2026 guidance miss (15-18% vs expectations). Insiders net sellers 18:1. Baron Fund exited. Goldman/Wells Fargo flag AI parity risk. But 35% current growth, 72% margins, $265M FCF. Sources: SEC filings, Fast Company, Seeking Alpha

Discovery: Down 81% from $544 high to ~$102, approaching 52-week low of $92; the drawdown is extreme but growth is intact — 35% YoY revenue growth to $283M quarterly, $1B+ annual revenue; strategic pivot to user-growth-first model triggered guidance-driven selloff but underlying business metrics are strong; 18 analysts consensus Buy with $177 average target (73% upside); risk is the growth-over-monetization shift delays profitability, but at this valuation the market is pricing in permanent impairment of a category-defining education platform
growth_picks.analyst_take: 12x PE with 35% revenue growth is cheap, but AI parity risk is real; insiders selling 18:1; conflicting expert views unresolved
